title: retama raetam
intro: Retama raetam, also known as the tree of life or white broom, is a shrub or small tree native to North Africa, the Middle East, and the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in Morocco, for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Retama raetam are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Retama raetam include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various conditions, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and gastrointestinal disorders.
